mistralai/Mistral-7B-Instruct-v0.2.matched_phenotypes: neurological symptoms (agitation, sleep disturbance), hepatosplenomegaly (liver enlargement), lung involvement (pulmonary arterial hypertension, emphysema)
renal symptoms (glycosuria, polydipsia, polyuria), cardiac involvement (cardiomyopathy, arrhythmias), cutaneous angioedema and hyperhidrosis

connective tissue disorder with fibrotic changes leading to skin thickening, Raynaud's phenomenon, esophageal dysmotility causing difficulty swallowing, interstitial lung disease, pulmonary artery hypertension, kidney damage
chronic obstructive pulmonary disease (emphysema, asthma), liver cirrhosis, pancreatitis
thyroid disorders (goiter, hypothyroidism), pulmonary toxicity (interstitial lung disease, cough, wheezing), peripheral neuropathies, dry skin, photosensitivity

muscle weakness, especially proximal muscles, resulting in difficulties walking or standing from sitting position; also presents with heart problems such as cardiomegaly and congestive heart failure
